display.purpose: Page titles and hero percentage values.

label.purpose: Small labels, factor names, metric units.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Highest elevation for dialogs and toasts.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. One per view. Used for the Analyze Location action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.55 0.14 195); color: #fff; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); width: 100%; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.48 0.14 195); box-shadow: 0 4px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.06); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.708 0 0); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outlined Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Used for Back to Map, About, and cancel actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); width: 100%; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.708 0 0); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content container. Used for the risk gauge, factor breakdown, and recommendations.
components.html:
Flood Susceptibility
97%
Flood Probability
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border-radius: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.06); font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-header { padding: 1rem 1rem 0.25rem 1rem; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-card-content { padding: 0.25rem 1rem 1rem 1rem; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Text input field used for searching districts in the sidebar.
components.css: .ds-input { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.625rem; height: 2rem; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Risk Badge
components.description: Risk level indicator pill. Color varies by severity: green, amber, orange, or rose.
components.css: .ds-chip-risk { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: oklch(0.9 0.06 45); color: oklch(0.35 0.14 45); font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Risk Gauge
components.description: The signature component. A typography-dominant risk display with percentage, label, and legend. Replaces the hero-metric template with typographic weight.
components.html:
97%
Flood Probability
Very High — Flooded
Low (0-25%)
Moderate (25-50%)
High (50-75%)
Very High (75-100%)
components.css: .ds-risk-gauge { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; text-align: center; } .ds-risk-pct { font-size: 3.75rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(0.58 0.22 27); } .ds-risk-label { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); font-weight: 500; } .ds-risk-badge { padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px oklch(0.58 0.22 27 / 0.33); } .ds-risk-legend { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 0.5rem; width: 100%; font-size: 0.75rem; } .ds-risk-tag { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview: Davao FloodSense is a public service tool, not a commercial dashboard. It feels approachable and trustworthy, like a community notice board that happens to be powered by machine learning. The interface is clean and confident, with a warm ocean accent that connects the tool to Davao's coastal identity without feeling thematic or decorative. The system explicitly rejects the generic SaaS dashboard: no gray sidebars, no metric card grids, no gradient text, no glassmorphism. Information is organized around the map, which is the primary interface. Cards float with a gentle shadow that signals depth without competing with the content. Every element earns its place.
keyCharacteristics: Map-first. The sidebar supports location selection, not the other way around.
Warm restraint. A single teal accent used sparingly (under 10% of any screen). Neutrals are achromatic.
Gentle shadow vocabulary. Cards are lifted but not floating, with soft diffused shadows.
Interpreted data, not raw values. Users are told what the risk means in plain language.

rules.name: The Minimal Palette Rule
rules.body: The teal accent covers under 10% of any screen. Color is a scarce resource; its rarity is the point. If a screen has more than two functional colors (accent + one semantic), something is wrong.

rules.name: The Semantic Pledge
rules.body: Risk levels use shape, position, and text label in addition to color. Red and green are never the only differentiator. The gauge legend, the badge text, and the factor breakdown all encode risk level redundantly.

rules.name: The Flat Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Three functional sizes (title, body, label) plus one display size for hero emphasis. No intermediate sizes. Scale contrast does the work.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to hierarchy or interaction.

dos: Do use the teal accent sparingly: one element per view at most.
Do let the map occupy the majority of the screen. The sidebar is a reference panel, not a navigation column.
Do use semantic color redundantly with text labels and position for risk levels.
Do prefer flat surfaces with gentle shadows over bordered containers.
Do keep card content tight: one title, one value or short description, one optional action.
Do use the full risk gauge legend (all four tiers) so users always see the scale.
donts: Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or heavy animations.
Don't use side-stripe borders as colored accents on cards. Use full background tints or nothing.
Don't build metric card grids. This is not a business analytics dashboard.
Don't show raw extracted values to the user. Interpret the data instead.
Don't use a sidebar navigation pattern. The map is the interface.
Don't use em dashes in copy.
Don't use modals as a first resort. Prefer inline expansion or a dedicated route.
